NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO REQUIRE PLTF TO FURNISH SECURITY PURSUANT TO CCP 391.1 AND TO ENTER PRE-FILING ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 391.7; REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
AMENDED/SUPPLEMENTAL REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO REQUIRE PLTF TO FURNISH SECURITY (CCP 391.1) ETC. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.1 AND TO ENTER PRE-FILING ORDER PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.7 (REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE). NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE COURT DECLARES PLAINTIFF TO BE A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391(B)(1), (B)(2) AND (B)(3). THERE IS NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT PLAINTIFF WILL PREVAIL IN THIS LITIGATION. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FURNISH SECURITY WITH THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 15, 2007 OR THIS ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT ENTERS A PRE-FILING ORDER PROHIBITING PLAINTIFF FROM FILING ANY NEW LITIGATION IN PROPERIA PERSONA WITHOUT FIRST OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Require Pltf To Furnish Security Pursuant To Ccp 391.1 And To Enter Pre-Filing Order Pursuant To Ccp 391.7; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Require PLAINTIFF To Furnish Security Pursuant To CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.1 And To Enter Pre-Filing Order Pursuant To CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.7 (Request For Judicial Notice) IS GRANTED. THE COURT DECLARES PLAINTIFF TO BE A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391(B)(1), (B)(2) AND (B)(3). THERE IS NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT PLAINTIFF WILL PREVAIL IN THIS LITIGATION. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FURNISH SECURITY WITH THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 15, 2007 OR THIS ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT ENTERS A PRE-FILING ORDER PROHIBITING PLAINTIFF FROM FILING ANY NEW LITIGATION IN PROPERIA PERSONA WITHOUT FIRST OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (302/PJM)
